roa.docketEntryComment: Order Designating Arrest as Detention Only Pursuant to Penal Code 849.5 - ORDER DECLARING THE MATTER A DETENTION ONLY PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE 849.5
PD PC 849,5 MOTION DEEM ARREST A DETENTION, FILED

/CAL  DEFENDANT'S PC849,5 MOTION TO DEEM ARREST A DETENTION/NP/X  NOT REPORTED/X: INCIDENT DATE 03-04-21/CTORD: SAN FRANCISCO POLICE REPORT INCIDENT NUMBER 210143167 DATED 03-04-21 IS DEEMED A DETENTION ONLY PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE 849,5/CTORD: THE SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT AND THE ATTORNEY GENRAL SHALL REQUEST THE DELETION OF ANY REFERENCE TO AN ARREST IN ANY ARREST RECORDS WHICH THEY HAVE GIVEN TO ANY LOCAL, STATE OR FEDERAL AGENCY WITHIN THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA SHALL DEENM THIS ACTION A DETENTION ONLY,/X:ORDER SIGNED AND FILED,/
